name: -h
--help
options.description: Display some basic help

subcommands.name: listext
subcommands.description: List all known file extensions available for import

subcommands.name: knowext
subcommands.description: List all known file extensions available for import

args.name: extension
args.description: Check whether a particular file extension is known by us

subcommands.name: exportinfo
subcommands.description: Show basic information on a specific export format

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: Load a model file and print basic statistics. Full postprocessing is applied unless the `-r` switch is specified

args.name: file
args.description: Print basic structure of a 3D model

name: -r
--raw
options.description: No postprocessing, do a raw import

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Print verbose info such as node transform data

name: -s
--silent
options.description: Print only minimal info

name: -h
--help
options.description: Detailed help on a command

subcommands.name: export
subcommands.description: Export a file to one of the supported output formats

args.name: model
args.description: Relative or absolute path to the input model

args.name: out
args.description: Relative or absolute path to write the output export to

name: -f
--format
options.description: Export file formats supported by Assimp

name: -h
--help
options.description: Detailed help on a command

args.name: model
args.description: Relative or absolute path to the input model

args.name: out
args.description: Relative or absolute path to write the output images to

name: -t
--texture
options.description: Zero-based index of the texture to be extracted

name: -ba
–-bmp-with-alpha
options.description: Specifies whether output BMPs contain an alpha channel or not

name: -f
--format
options.description: Specifies the output file format. Supported formats are BMP and TGA. The default value is BMP (if a full output filename is specified, the output file format is taken from its extension)

name: -s
–-nosuffix
options.description: Prevents the tool from adding the _img<n> suffix to all filenames. This option must be specified together with -t to ensure that just one image is written

options.name: -cfast
options.description: Fast post processing preset, runs just a few important steps

options.name: -cdefault
options.description: Default post processing: runs all recommended steps

options.name: -cfull
options.description: Fires almost all post processing steps

name: -h
--help
options.description: Detailed help on a command

subcommands.name: dump
subcommands.description: Convert models to a binary or textual dump (ASSBIN/ASSXML)

args.name: model
args.description: Relative or absolute path to the input model

args.name: out
args.description: Relative or absolute path to write the output dump to. If it is omitted, the dump is written to '<model>-dump.txt'

name: -b
--binary
options.description: If true, the dump is written in binary format

name: -s
--short
options.description: If true, the dump is shortened to include only min/max values for all vertex components and animation channels

name: -z
--compressed
options.description: If true, Compressed

options.name: -cfast
options.description: Fast post processing preset, runs just a few important steps

options.name: -cdefault
options.description: Default post processing: runs all recommended steps

options.name: -cfull
options.description: Fires almost all post processing steps

name: -h
--help
options.description: Detailed help on a command

args.name: expected
args.description: Archived dump from some point in the past

name: -h
--help
options.description: Detailed help on a command
